name: Dynavap - The Perforated Cap
summary: Dynavap - The Perforated Cap — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The unique design of the Perforated Cap includes numerous tiny perforations made with advanced laser techniques, resulting in captivating and intricate patterns. This specially crafted cap provides a wide range of heating properties and improved airflow for extended, more enjoyable sessions. The Perforated Captive Cap will fit with any DynaVap Tip. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
